name: vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-query-builder
description: MyndHyve market-intel.query-builder — generate intent-mapped search queries (4-8 query groups × 4 intent stages, 2-4 variations each, synonym maps, platform hints) + per-competitor query packs (comparison/switching/alternative) + topic clusters from ICP + product context. Pairs with ai-discovery: query-builder produces 'what to search for', ai-discovery produces 'where to search'. Eighth marketIntel pack of the Stage 5 cohort.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Build Market Research Queries
nodes.description: Single AI call. Inputs: icpContext + productContext (both required) + optional competitors / seedKeywords / geography / targetPlatforms / maxQueriesPerStage. Outputs: queryGroups (per intent stage with primaryQuery + variations + synonyms + signal strength + per-platform hints) + competitorQueries + topicClusters + summary (rebuilt from validated data — totalQueries counts primary+variations+competitor queries). Soft validation: missing primaryQuery → drop; invalid enums use safe defaults.
